_publications._publicationTitle: Overcoming BET Inhibitor Resistance in Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors.

_contextSnippet: Through CRISPR/Cas9-based genome editing and the heterogeneity of endogenous BRD4 expression levels in MPNST cells, we generated Brd4-depleted mouse MPNST (mMPNST) cell clones
details: Successfully used for CRISPR/Cas9-based genome editing to generate Brd4-depleted mouse MPNST cell clones with different levels of BRD4 expression
